case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HINOJOSA, ALFONSO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HINOJOSA, ALFONSO $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
